text: The aim of this study is to investigate the role of Merdeka Mengajar in conducting Teacher Professional Development and integrating technology in SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu Mojokerto so as to analyze teacher’s perceptions and experiences using the platform of Merdeka Mengajar in accordance with the educational quality improvement by means of increasing the teacher’s pedagogic competence, collaboration between teacher and student, and using technology for learning resources. This study employs a qualitative approach. In accordance with the purpose of this study, the researchers analyze several things related to SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu Mojokerto teachers’ perceptions on the role of Merdeka Mengajar platform which turns out to be able to access numerous learning materials so that they are able to enrich teaching materials which enable them to deliver their materials more attractively as well as the innovations adopted in the modern era, yet still have difficulties in incorporating technology into the teaching materials and sometimes experiencing network failure. As to whether or not the SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu teachers found Merdeka Mengajar beneficial for improving students’ engagement and quality of learning, the SMK Negeri 1 Dlanggu teachers on the whole stated that the activities they carried out in Merdeka Mengajar platforms are effective in enhancing students’ engagement and quality of learning. Consequently, this study recommends a series of further assistance given to teachers for utilizing technology optimally, as well as collaboration between schools and Merdeka Mengajar, and between managers of the Merdeka program and teachers. Keywords—Teacher professional development, technology in vocational schools, Merdeka Mengajar initiative This program is very efficient for us to enhance the quality of learning and also for assisting teachers in performing the duty of teaching the students; thereby increasing the teacher’s pedagogic competence which is needed by vocational teachers in this era, fostering collaboration between teacher and student, and also in making use of various sources of learning materials located in technology platform which can increase the innovativeness of vocational teachers in handling educational materials, and increase students’ engagement and quality of learning.
headline: Fully Human Written
